must_have: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems (sentence-transformers, OpenAI embeddings, BGE, E5, or similar)
Experience handling embedding drift, index refresh, retrieval-quality regression in production
Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, OpenSearch, Elasticsearch, FAISS)
Operational experience with vector DB / hybrid search (not just tutorial-level exposure)
Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems (NDCG, MRR, MAP, A/B test interpretation)
Has shipped at least one end-to-end ranking, search, or recommendation system to real users at meaningful scale
Production code written in last 18 months
good_to_have: Experience with learning-to-rank models (XGBoost-based or neural L2R)
Prior exposure to HR-tech, recruiting tech, or marketplace products
Background in distributed systems or large-scale inference optimization
Open-source contributions in the AI/ML space
Blog posts, papers, or conference talks demonstrating public thought leadership
experience_note: Range is indicative, not strict. 4 years acceptable if other signals are strong. Disqualifiers apply regardless of years.
ideal_experience_years: 6-8 years total, of which 4-5 are in applied ML/AI at product companies
negative_industries: Pure consulting firms: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini
Note: consulting background OK if candidate ALSO has product-company experience
seniority: Senior / Staff level with a bias toward hands-on coding (not pure architecture/management)
seniority_note: This role writes production code. Candidates who have moved to pure 'architecture' or 'tech lead' roles without coding in 18+ months are explicitly excluded.
locations_negative: Outside India — case-by-case, no visa sponsorship

notice_period.note: Sub-30 days ideal. Up to 30 days can be bought out. Over 30 days reduces priority but does not disqualify.

behavioral_traits: Ships working systems even if ML is suboptimal — values iteration over perfection
Writes async-first — comfortable with written communication over verbal
Disagrees openly, decides quickly — tolerant of constructive conflict
Comfortable with ambiguity and fast-changing requirements
Plans to stay 3+ years — not a title-chaser or job-hopper
Thinks about systems, not just frameworks
Has strong opinions on retrieval / evaluation / LLM integration and can defend them
Active on Redrob platform or clear signal of being in the job market
Willing to travel quarterly for offsites
cultural_expectations: Founding-team mindset — role evolves every 6 months as company grows
Async-first work style — heavy on writing
Fast-moving startup culture — stable mature codebase not the norm
Willing to mentor next round of hires
negative_signals: Career trajectory shows title-chasing (switching every 1.5 years for title bumps)
GitHub/blog shows only framework tutorials, no systems thinking
Entire career at consulting firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini)
Primary expertise in CV/speech/robotics without NLP/IR exposure
5+ years on closed-source proprietary systems with no external validation
AI experience is primarily recent (<12 months) LangChain API-wrapping
Pure research background — academic labs or research-only roles without production deployment
Has not written production code in last 18 months
Keyword stuffing: AI skills listed but career history is irrelevant (Marketing Manager, HR Manager, etc.)
Inactive on platform: last_active_date > 6 months ago
recruiter_response_rate < 0.15 — not responsive to recruiter outreach

hidden_signals.career_history_must_match_title: A candidate with 'Senior ML Engineer' as title but a career of 'Business Analyst' roles is a keyword stuffer.
hidden_signals.product_vs_services_distinction: Time at product companies (startups, scale-ups, tech cos) is more valuable than equivalent time at IT services firms.
hidden_signals.pre_llm_experience_valued: Experience with retrieval/ranking before 2022 (pre-ChatGPT era) indicates genuine depth.
hidden_signals.recommendation_systems_is_adjacent: Recommendation systems experience is a strong positive signal even if not explicitly 'search/retrieval'.
hidden_signals.data_engineering_is_not_ml: Strong data pipeline background (Spark, Airflow, ETL) without ML modeling is insufficient for this role.
hidden_signals.platform_engagement: open_to_work_flag + recent last_active_date + reasonable recruiter_response_rate = actually reachable candidate.
hidden_signals.github_activity_positive: github_activity_score > 40 is a positive signal for technical engagement.
hidden_signals.startup_experience_valued: Company size '1-10', '11-50', '51-200' at product companies shows startup/founding team experience.

evaluation_anti_patterns.keyword_stuffing_trap: Do NOT rank by AI keyword count in skills section. HR Managers with 9 AI skills should rank low.
evaluation_anti_patterns.experience_years_trap: Do NOT rank purely by years_of_experience. 15 years as a Mechanical Engineer < 5 years as an ML Engineer.
evaluation_anti_patterns.availability_trap: Do NOT ignore behavioral signals. Perfect-on-paper + inactive/unresponsive = poor practical candidate.
evaluation_anti_patterns.honeypot_trap: ~80 candidates have impossible profiles (timeline contradictions, salary inversions, etc.). Must detect and exclude.
